calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption And Ntc Of Oppos.
Off Calendar Sep-18-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ric Lopez, defendant/claimant/judgment debtor, appearing on his own behalf;
No other appearance.

RULING: Mr. Lopez provided the Court with documentation regarding his financial situation. The matter was discussed. For good cause and to the satisfaction of the Court, DEFENDANT RIC LOPEZ' Claim Of Exemption is granted. The levying officer is directed to release any funds held to the judgment debtor. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-07-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge Ellen Chaitin., Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee, CSR: Karen Held, #2857

THOMAS RAY, Esq. appeared for plaintiff ASSET ACCEPTANCE.
No appearance by defendant RIC LOPEZ.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff ASSET ACCEPTANCE, and against the Defaulted Defendant RIC LOPEZ as follows:

DAMAGES $8657.41; PRE JUDGMT INT 10% $2820.30; COSTS $245.; ATTY'S FEES $800.; TOTAL JUDGMT $12,522.71.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-07-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

Notice And Motion To Compel Responses; Declare Requests For Admissions Deemed Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-26-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES; DECLARE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS DEEMED ADMITTED; AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS. Appearances: Ric Lopez (810.8577) defendant and responding party appearing in propria persona. No other appearances. Discussed and the court modified its ruling as follows: Granted, no opposition filed, with the exception of plaintiff's request for sanctions, which is denied. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported
